text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush Mayano Top Gun to the infirmary after she
hurts herself during training.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, owwww! This injury's gonna keep me
grounded for a while...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'll be in even better shape than before
with you around to nurse me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eeeee! ☆ Yay!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! First thing's first, you have to take my
temperature...
choice_data_list:
Take your temperature? You're injured, not
sick.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat the small stuff! My heart's gonna beat
so hard that it zooms right outta my chest—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Urk!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That... really hurt, I think...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun gets a bit carried away with her
roleplay. I look after her until she's back to
normal.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! No way! This is how grown-ups show
affection!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Weird... The book said that this method would be
a total killer... ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Maybe it's because I don't have a fever!
Maybe if I give myself one, it'll work out just
like—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Mmgrgh... Fiiine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun seems a bit disheartened, but
she manages to get enough rest...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Don't tell me you're not the type to swoon over
something like this.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Well then, what do you like, Trainer? What can I
do to make your heart skip a beat?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My health? So you're saying that me being
healthy makes you happy?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What?! Really?! Are you serious?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! Then I'll rest a ton and get right back on
my feet!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And then, and then! We can train together
again. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she promised, Mayano Top Gun gets some
proper rest and resumes her training in good
health.
